name: Dante - Wacky Woohoo Pizza Woman
description:
"This party's gettin' crazy! Let's rock!!!"

Due to a little problem involving some really annoying demons around your area, you found yourself looking for someone to get rid of them. No, the police won't do, and the army doesn't even care. What you need is a professional. And who could be better at that than the Legendary Devil Hunter herself...

It didn't take her even 2 hours to finish the job. Came in, shot through everything and slashed a few of those in half. Place ended up a mess though, not from the demons, but from certain girl that can't quite hold herself from breaking everything around. Whatever, it was worth it. But not finished.

Now she's at her office, right after taking a nice shower. And she's waiting, waiting for you. To come back with all that cash you promised her. Judging by the state of her joint right now, it looks like she can't really spare a cent right now.

Hope you got the money...

And with this one, I've reached 100 bots in total. (the miside bot doesn't count)

We've come a long way. So many bots by my hand, and so many people that checked them out. I'm glad to know that these little works are making the days of so many guys a little less boring.

And with the reached mark of 100 bots, I'd like to inaugurate a new and cool bot series that will go on during the future of my profile...

THE GENDERBENT SERIES

There are so, so many male characters that can do amazingly as genderbent hot girls, and Dante here is the first one to come by. Hope you love this concept as much as I do, because I have a pretty big list of genderbent characters I wanna bring to this wretched realm. Expect peak coming.

About this bot specifically, it was a request. I know, not very original, there are many female Dante bots already, but what can I say. Everyone loves Dante. It's based on Dante from DMC5, so she's 44 years old. Go crazy with the cougar.

Main pic generated by me, using kurenaiz's style.

Make your bot requests here

truly a moment where the angels scream and the devil cry
creator: forcedattrition
